summary: root.go newClient() injects an ARMBearer() token into the generated client's auth header so absorbed ARM commands (subscriptions, sync, apps) send a real AAD token instead of the AZURE_TENANT_ID placeholder.
reason: The generated client models auth as a bearer token read from AZURE_TENANT_ID (a GUID, not a token). Without the injection those commands send the GUID and get HTTP 401.
validated_outcome: subscriptions / sync / apps return live ARM data under the dogfood gate.
